name: prompt-enhancer
description: Improve and enhance prompts — turn a raw, vague, or first-draft prompt into a clearer, stronger instruction by applying an ordered set of prompt-engineering techniques and returning the rewrite plus a tagged change log.

interface.shortDescription: Improve a base prompt into a stronger one
interface.longDescription: Use Prompt Enhancer to turn a raw, vague, or first-draft prompt into a clearer, stronger instruction by applying an ordered set of prompt-engineering techniques (clarity, context, multishot examples, XML structure, role, chain-of-thought, prompt chaining) and returning the rewrite plus a tagged change log explaining what changed and why.
defaultPrompt: Use Prompt Enhancer to improve this prompt.
Use Prompt Enhancer to rewrite this prompt into a stronger system prompt.
Use Prompt Enhancer to tighten and clarify this vague prompt.
